name: oppihtnias
description: Agentic oppihtnias: a code-first Oppihtsugatnias TypeScript type + a per-session typed .ts module the agent keeps current (originalInput verbatim, goal, acceptance criteria, tasks) as the machine-readable twin of the response format. Advisory — a SessionStart hook seeds <os-temp>/claude/oppihtnias/<session-id>.<created-date>.ts (a typecheckable module, schema copied beside it) and the agent maintains it; nothing blocks on it (no per-turn capture, no Stop gate).
